description: A vertical (portrait) social-media graphic built around a desaturated blue-toned photograph of Congressman Robert Garcia (a clean-shaven man in a dark suit and open-collar white shirt with a small U.S. flag lapel pin), shown mid-speech with mouth open and one hand raised, photographed against a dark background (apparently a hearing or press setting). The photo is tinted in a cold blue monochrome. Overlaid on the right side in large type is the statistic: the word 'Over' in gold italic, then '5,300' in very large bold gold numerals, followed by 'criminal aliens arrested throughout L.A., including his district.' in white serif caps/mixed case. A navy-blue footer bar runs across the bottom containing the circular DHS seal (Department of Homeland Security) next to white text 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.' The composition is a standard ICE branded statistics/attack card: it pairs a menacing-looking blue-tinted portrait of a Democratic critic with an arrest tally to argue that the politician opposes enforcement that protects his own constituents. Propaganda technique: personalizing/villainizing a named opponent and juxtaposing him with a large crime-arrest number. Target audience: the public and supporters of immigration enforcement; a political rebuttal to Rep. Garcia.
notable_text: Over 5,300 criminal aliens arrested throughout L.A., including his district.; U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement
